sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59958" key="kriqi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρῑθ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n59958.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feed with barley</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:178" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">178</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:76:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">76.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
